message:
feat(cli): XDG-compliant config.env, token doctor check, AGENT_MAIL_URL

Setup command changes:
- Move token storage from project .env to XDG config dir
  ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mcp-agent-mail/config.env)
- Reorder token resolution: config.env now takes priority over
  HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN env var

Doctor command changes:
- Add mcp_config_token sub-check that verifies bearer tokens in MCP
  config files match the canonical token, warns on mismatch
- Support AGENT_MAIL_URL env var for desired URL resolution
- Add extract_mcp_agent_mail_config_bearer helpers for JSON and TOML

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
